done.description: Updated the compliance calculation to handle edge case with mid-year plan amendments where participants have both pre-amendment and post-amendment contribution limits
Implemented validation logic to ensure 5500 filing deadlines are calculated correctly for plans with different plan year ends, including handling of extension requests
Refreshed quarterly participant disclosure templates to reflect 2026 IRS guidance changes and clarify language around automatic enrollment features

in_progress.description: Building automated workflow to generate and distribute safe harbor notices 30-90 days before plan year start. Currently working on template generation logic and compliance checks
Large refactor to consolidate scattered contribution limit validation logic into a single service. Currently addressing test failures in the payroll integration suite

up_next.summary: Add support for QACA safe harbor plans
up_next.description: Need to implement support for Qualified Automatic Contribution Arrangement (QACA) safe harbor plans, including special vesting and contribution requirements
Update hardship withdrawal approval workflow to properly track and store required documentation per SECURE Act 2.0 requirements
Code review needed for changes to vesting schedule calculation logic that handles cliff and graded vesting with break-in-service rules

slack_attention.description: Plan sponsor coordinator asking about how to handle a client who needs to file a 5500 extension but missed the original deadline. Need to clarify the technical process and any manual workarounds

slack_attention.summary: Question about contribution limit test failures
slack_attention.description: Another engineer seeing intermittent test failures in contribution_limit_spec.rb and asking if it's related to recent changes. Should respond since I touched this area yesterday
